visa_types.name: Member Of Family And Citizen From European Union
visa_types.documents_required:
Member of family and European Union citizen – he is her spouse, parents, if  European Union citizen  under 21 age ,  which he lives together with her, descendant under 21 age, or descendant whose  spouse is European Union citizen, at the same time kinship or close relation  with European Union citizen. If it is educational trip on that time member of  family- it’s only spouse or minor
Vulnerable person  - he’s supported by  European Union citizen or his spouse, preparing for a future profession or  foreign citizen, who for his sickness or trauma   can’t prepare his future profession or for his medical disability he  can’t work.
Application form
- Must be  filled with capital letters only in English, in latin alphabet
- Must be signed by parents/ legal guardian (if applicants under age 18)
Photo
- Biometric photo
- Colored, 3,5 x 4,5 (approximately 1,2 x 1,6 inch)
- Light and monophonic background (white)
Passport
- Passport  must be issued not late within 10 years
- At least 3 months till intended visit from schengen area
- Minimum two free pages
- Passport copy: identificatin page and all previous visas to schengen area (with stamps)
 Identification  card
- Original and copy of two pages
Original or notarial confirmed  copy about certification of marriage or certification of birth, proof of  relation
             with European Union citizen
Confirmation documents that  applicants have a plan with citizens of European Union to travel together   
            or travel to citizen to European Union which  he/she is already in Czech Republic territory.
The list of supporting documents can be found below.
Supporting Documents List (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6YwwmBQAJ3uWsTXxbzf0SK/488c18e88343c3c552aa8daff904c380/Supporting_Document_List.pdf)
visa_types.visa_fees:
[Table: Member Of Family And Citizen From European Union]
Please Note: 
There is a service charge of 49 AZN (Inclusive of 18% VAT) levied per application over and above the visa fees
The visa application centre offers an  optional service at a nominal additional cost: 

[Table: Member Of Family And Citizen From European Union]
All Visa Fee are to be paid in cash only  in Euro.
All VFS service charges are to be paid  in cash only in AZN.
 All optional services are to be paid in cash only in AZN.
visa_types.processing_time:
The processing time of visa applications are in the discretion of the Embassy of Czech Republic in Baku.
  Visa applications shall be decided on within 15 calendar days after the embassy or consulate has received the application. The decision period may be extended to 45 days when further consideration is needed.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa type is granted who has family member from European Union citizenship.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa type is granted who has family member from European Union citizenship.

## Visa Fees

[Table: Member Of Family And Citizen From European Union]
Please Note: 
There is a service charge of 49 AZN (Inclusive of 18% VAT) levied per application over and above the visa fees
The visa application centre offers an  optional service at a nominal additional cost: 

[Table: Member Of Family And Citizen From European Union]
All Visa Fee are to be paid in cash only  in Euro.
All VFS service charges are to be paid  in cash only in AZN.
 All optional services are to be paid in cash only in AZN. 

## Documents Required

## Required documents to get schengen visa for a member of  family and citizen from European Union
Member of family and European Union citizen – he is her spouse, parents, if  European Union citizen  under 21 age ,  which he lives together with her, descendant under 21 age, or descendant whose  spouse is European Union citizen, at the same time kinship or close relation  with European Union citizen. If it is educational trip on that time member of  family- it’s only spouse or minor
Vulnerable person  - he’s supported by  European Union citizen or his spouse, preparing for a future profession or  foreign citizen, who for his sickness or trauma   can’t prepare his future profession or for his medical disability he  can’t work.
Application form
- Must be  filled with capital letters only in English, in latin alphabet
- Must be signed by parents/ legal guardian (if applicants under age 18)
Photo
- Biometric photo
- Colored, 3,5 x 4,5 (approximately 1,2 x 1,6 inch)
- Light and monophonic background (white)
Passport
- Passport  must be issued not late within 10 years
- At least 3 months till intended visit from schengen area
- Minimum two free pages
- Passport copy: identificatin page and all previous visas to schengen area (with stamps)
 Identification  card
- Original and copy of two pages
Original or notarial confirmed  copy about certification of marriage or certification of birth, proof of  relation
             with European Union citizen
Confirmation documents that  applicants have a plan with citizens of European Union to travel together   
            or travel to citizen to European Union which  he/she is already in Czech Republic territory.
The list of supporting documents can be found below.
Supporting Documents List (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6YwwmBQAJ3uWsTXxbzf0SK/488c18e88343c3c552aa8daff904c380/Supporting_Document_List.pdf)

## Photo Specifications
- No more than 6-months old
- 35-45 mm in width
- Taken against a light       background
- Close up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70 -80% of the photograph
- No glasses

## Processing Time
The processing time of visa applications are in the discretion of the Embassy of Czech Republic in Baku.
  Visa applications shall be decided on within 15 calendar days after the embassy or consulate has received the application. The decision period may be extended to 45 days when further consideration is needed.

## Download Form
Click for English version of Application form. 
Click for Czech version of Application form. 
Note: Application should fill in English language with capital letter.

visa_types.name: General Schengen Visa For Czech Republic
visa_types.documents_required:
Application  form
- Must be filled with capital letters in English, in latin alphabet
- Must be signed by parents/ legal guardian (if applicants under age18)
Photo
- Biometric photo
- Colored, 3,5 x 4,5 (approximately 1,2 x 1,6 inch)
- Light and monophonic background (white)
Passport
- Passport must be issued not late within  10 years
- At least 3 months till intended visit from schengen area
- Minimum two free pages
- Passport copy: identification page and all previous visas to schengen area (with stamps)
Identification card
- Original and copy of two pages
Confirmation of accomodation
- All notarial confirmation documents must not be late 6 months.
 Flight Reservation
- Ticket reservation in two ways
- Ticket reservation for double visa in two ways for both trips
  Medical  Insurance M
- Medical insurance to Schengen area, covering the entire period of intended  stay, the minimum coverage must be 30.000 EUR/ 50 000 US
- For registration double visa, must be submitted insurance for both trips
- For multi visa you should sign 4th   pages of application form , where customer states to cover insurance the entire  period of trip
 Proof of applicant’s  regular income
- Reference from work
- For business visa:  The company registration in the chamber of  commerce and a copy of the bulletin of the trade register (VOEN)
- Reference from Pension fund proof of getting pension
- All references from regular income
 Proof of applicant’s  pay slip
- Reference from bank ( at least 60 EURO for one day for one person, it’s  possible with EURO or different currency )
- Copy of international credit card (credit card) from the same bank which you  get reference
Sponsor
- Notarial confirmation of sponsor letter in english or russian language, with  contact details (working cell and home number) of sponsor
- Reference from bank or work sponsor person
- Copy of sponsor ID
 If applicant is minor
- Copy of certificate  of birth
- Power of attorney from a not-travelling  parent(s) or legal guardian(if customer goes alone)
Attention: All documents and copies (except passport copy) in Azerbaijan language must be translated to Russian or English language with notarial confirmation.

Attention: Dear customer! All checklist documents suggested to Azerbaijan citizens. Citizens from different countries can submit all noticed documents only if he/she has registration card to Azerbaijan Republic, after his/her return from schengen area must be minimum 3 months

Attention: The consulate at Czech embassy may need extra documents. All documents must be submitted not earlier 6 months (180 days) applying to schengen area.

The list of supporting documents can be found below. 
Supporting Documents List (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6YwwmBQAJ3uWsTXxbzf0SK/488c18e88343c3c552aa8daff904c380/Supporting_Document_List.pdf)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This  is a visa for visiting Czech Republic for other general purposes.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This  is a visa for visiting Czech Republic for other general purposes.

## Visa Fees

[Table: General Schengen Visa For Czech Republic]
Please Note: 
There is a service charge of 49 AZN (Inclusive of 18% VAT) levied per application over and above the visa fees
The visa application centre offers an  optional service at a nominal additional cost: 

[Table: General Schengen Visa For Czech Republic]
All Visa Fee are to be paid in cash only  in Euro.
All VFS service charges are to be paid  in cash only in AZN.
All optional services are to be paid in cash only in AZN. 

## Documents Required

## Requried  documents to get schengen visa to Czech Republic
Application  form
- Must be filled with capital letters in English, in latin alphabet
- Must be signed by parents/ legal guardian (if applicants under age18)
Photo
- Biometric photo
- Colored, 3,5 x 4,5 (approximately 1,2 x 1,6 inch)
- Light and monophonic background (white)
Passport
- Passport must be issued not late within  10 years
- At least 3 months till intended visit from schengen area
- Minimum two free pages
- Passport copy: identification page and all previous visas to schengen area (with stamps)
Identification card
- Original and copy of two pages
Confirmation of accomodation
- All notarial confirmation documents must not be late 6 months.
 Flight Reservation
- Ticket reservation in two ways
- Ticket reservation for double visa in two ways for both trips
  Medical  Insurance M
- Medical insurance to Schengen area, covering the entire period of intended  stay, the minimum coverage must be 30.000 EUR/ 50 000 US
- For registration double visa, must be submitted insurance for both trips
- For multi visa you should sign 4th   pages of application form , where customer states to cover insurance the entire  period of trip
 Proof of applicant’s  regular income
- Reference from work
- For business visa:  The company registration in the chamber of  commerce and a copy of the bulletin of the trade register (VOEN)
- Reference from Pension fund proof of getting pension
- All references from regular income
 Proof of applicant’s  pay slip
- Reference from bank ( at least 60 EURO for one day for one person, it’s  possible with EURO or different currency )
- Copy of international credit card (credit card) from the same bank which you  get reference
Sponsor
- Notarial confirmation of sponsor letter in english or russian language, with  contact details (working cell and home number) of sponsor
- Reference from bank or work sponsor person
- Copy of sponsor ID
 If applicant is minor
- Copy of certificate  of birth
- Power of attorney from a not-travelling  parent(s) or legal guardian(if customer goes alone)
Attention: All documents and copies (except passport copy) in Azerbaijan language must be translated to Russian or English language with notarial confirmation.

Attention: Dear customer! All checklist documents suggested to Azerbaijan citizens. Citizens from different countries can submit all noticed documents only if he/she has registration card to Azerbaijan Republic, after his/her return from schengen area must be minimum 3 months

Attention: The consulate at Czech embassy may need extra documents. All documents must be submitted not earlier 6 months (180 days) applying to schengen area.

The list of supporting documents can be found below. 
Supporting Documents List (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6YwwmBQAJ3uWsTXxbzf0SK/488c18e88343c3c552aa8daff904c380/Supporting_Document_List.pdf)

## Photo Specifications
- No more than 6-months old
- 35-45 mm in width
- Taken against a light       background
- Close up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70 -80% of the photograph
- No glasses

## Processing Time
The processing time of visa applications are in the discretion of the Embassy of Czech Republic in Baku.

## Download Form

Click for Czech version of Application form. 
Note: Application should fill in English language with capital letter.

              with signiture and stamp

name, surname, date of birth,number of passport,  reservation date , signiture/stamp of hotel

- All references from regular income

If  applicant is minor

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa type is granted for people want to go to Czech Republic for Educational or Scientific Research.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa type is granted for people want to go to Czech Republic for Educational or Scientific Research.

## Visa Fees

[Table: Cultural, Scientific Or Artistic Events]
Please Note: 
There is a service charge of 49 AZN (Inclusive of 18% VAT) levied per application over and above the visa fees
The visa application centre offers an optional service at a  nominal additional cost:

[Table: Cultural, Scientific Or Artistic Events]
All Visa Fee are to be paid in cash only  in Euro.
All VFS service charges are to be paid  in cash only in AZN.
All optional services are to be paid in cash only in AZN. 

## Documents Required

## List of documents to get schengen visa in order to educational or  scientific research visit
Application  form
- Must be filled with capital letters in English, in latin alphabet
- Must be signed by parents/ legal guardian (if applicants under age18)
Photo
- Biometric photo
- Colored, 3,5 x 4,5 (approximately 1,2 x 1,6 inch)
- Light and monophonic background (white)

- At least 3 months till intended visit from schengen area
- Minimum two free pages

Identification  card
- Original and copy of two pages
Confirmation  about education/ scientific research
- Confirmation about accepted to  educational institution at Czech Republic in Czech/ Russian/ English language  
              with signiture and stamp
- Invitation letter in Czech/ Russian/ English language with signiture and  stamp which will be shown  goal of trip
- It must be shown contact details of educational institution at Czech Republic  and customer’s data (name, surname, number of passport, date of birth)
Confirmation  of accomodation
 Confirmation of living from hotel where will be shown:
name, surname, date of birth,number of passport,  reservation date , signiture/stamp of hotel 
 Flight Reservation
- Ticket reservation in two ways
Medical  Insurance
- Medical insurance to Schengen area, covering the entire period of intended  stay, the minimum coverage must be 30.000 EUR/ 50 000 US
- For registration double visa, must be submitted insurance for both trips
- For multi visa you should sign 4th   pages of applicatin form , where customer states to cover insurance the entire  period of trip
Proof  of applicants regular income
- Reference from work
- For business visa:  The company registration in the chamber of  commerce and a copy of the bulletin of the trade register (VOEN)
- Reference from Pension fund proof of getting pension
- All references from regular income
Proof  of applicant’s pay slip
- Reference from bank (  at least 60 EURO for one day for one person, it’s possible with EURO or  different currency )
- Copy of international credit card (credit card) from the same bank which you  get reference
Sponsor
- Notarial confirmation of sponsor letter in english or russian language, with  contact details (working cell and home number) of sponsor
- Reference from bank or work sponsor person
- Copy of sponsor ID
If  applicant is minor
- Copy of certificate  of birth
- Power of attorney from a not-travelling  parent(s) or legal guardian(if applicant goes alone)
Attention: All documents and copies (except passport copy) in Azerbaijan language must be translated to Russian or English language with notarial confirmation.

Attention: Dear customers! All checklist documents suggested to Azerbaijan citizens. Citizens from different countries can submit all noticed documents only if he/she has registration card to Azerbaijan Republic, after his/her return from schengen area must be minimum 3 months

Attention: The consulate at Czech embassy may need extra documents. All documents must be submitted not earlier 6 months (180 days) applying to schengen area.

The list of supporting documents can be found below. 
Supporting Documents List (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6YwwmBQAJ3uWsTXxbzf0SK/488c18e88343c3c552aa8daff904c380/Supporting_Document_List.pdf)

## Photo Specifications
- No more than 6-months old
- 35-45 mm in width
- Taken against a light       background
- Close up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70 -80% of the photograph
- No glasses

## Processing Time
The processing time of visa applications are in the discretion of the Embassy of Czech Republic in Baku. Visa applications shall 
  be decided on within 15 calendar days after the embassy or consulate has received the application. 
  The decision period may be extended to 45 days when further consideration is needed.

visa_types.name: Tourism
visa_types.documents_required:
Application  form
- Must be filled with capital letters only in English, in latin  alphabet
- Must be signed by parents/ legal guardian (if applicants under age18)
 Photo
- Biometric photo
- Colored, 3,5 x 4,5 (approximately 1,2 x 1,6 inch)
- Light and monophonic background (white)
 Passport
- Passport must be  issued not late within 10 years
- At least 3 months till intended visit from schengen area
- Minimum two free pages
- Passport copy: identificatin page and  all previous schengen visas (with stamps)
Identification  card 
- Original and copy of  two pages
Confirmation  of  staying and  purpose of visit
As a tourist:  confirmation from hotel or sanatorium where  will be shown 
name, surname, date of birth,number  of passport,  reservation date ,  signiture and stamp of hotel 
For treatmetnt: offical document from  medical organization at Czech Republic,  confirmation of  medical service in this  organization. In document should be shown period of staying and approximately value of treatment. In addition treatment doctor must have recomendation  letter. 
 Flight Reservation
- Ticket reservation in two ways
Medical Insurance
- Medical insurance to Schengen area, covering the entire period of intended  stay, the minimum coverage must be 30.000 EUR/ 50 000 US
- For registration double visa, must be submitted insurance for both trips
- For multi visa you should sign 4th   pages of application form , where customer states to 
              cover insurance the entire  period of trip
 Proof of applicants  regular income
- Reference from work
- For business visa:  The company registration in the chamber of  commerce and a copy of the bulletin of the trade register (VOEN)
- Reference from Pension fund proof of getting pension
- All references from regular income
Proof of applicant’s  pay slip
- Reference from bank (  at least 60 EURO for one day for one person, it’s possible with EURO or  different currency )
- Copy of international credit card (credit card) from the same bank which you  get reference
 Sponsor: 
- Notarial confirmation of sponsor letter in english or russian language, with  contact details (working cell and home number) of sponsor
- Reference from bank or work sponsor person
- Copy of sponsor ID
  If applicant is minor
- Copy of certificate  of birth
- Power of attorney from a not-travelling  parent(s) or legal guardian(if customers goes alone)
Attention: All documents and copies (except passport copy) in Azerbaijan language must be translated to Russian or English language with notarial confirmation.

Attention: Dear customers! All checklist documents suggested to Azerbaijan citizens. Citizens from different countries can submit all noticed documents only if he/she has registration card to Azerbaijan Republic, after his/her return from schengen area must be minimum 3 months

Attention: The consulate at Czech embassy may need extra documents. All documents must be submitted not earlier 6 months (180 days) applying to schengen area.

The list of supporting documents can be found below. 
- 1.Certificate  of birth must be translated into in English or in Russian with notarial affirmation  (for everyone under 18 age)
- 2.Transportations  between Shengen countries must be shown
- 3.Bank  statement and the copy of the plastic card from the same bank
- 4.All  the documents except the identity card are accepted in English or Russian
- 5.Application  form must be filled with capital letters only in English with Latin graphic
- 6.Confirmation  letter from the hotel must be signed and sealed
- 7.It  is necessary to show the sealed and signed documents about the places you will  stay during your trip.
Supporting Documents List (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6YwwmBQAJ3uWsTXxbzf0SK/488c18e88343c3c552aa8daff904c380/Supporting_Document_List.pdf)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Tourist visa is granted for those where the intention is to visit Czech Republic for tourism and sightseeing without having 
  an invitation from Czech Republic referent.
visa_types.full_text:

- 3.Bank  statement and the copy of the plastic card from the same bank
- 4.All  the documents except the identity card are accepted in English or Russian
- 5.Application  form must be filled with capital letters only in English with Latin graphic
- 6.Confirmation  letter from the hotel must be signed and sealed
- 7.It  is necessary to show the sealed and signed documents about the places you will  stay during your trip.
Supporting Documents List (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6YwwmBQAJ3uWsTXxbzf0SK/488c18e88343c3c552aa8daff904c380/Supporting_Document_List.pdf)

## Photo Specifications
- No more than 6-months old
- 35-45 mm in width
- Taken against a light       background
- Close up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70 -80% of the photograph
- No glasses

## Processing Time
The processing time of visa applications are in the discretion of the Embassy of Czech Republic in Baku.Visa applications shall be decided on within 15 calendar days after the embassy or consulate has received the application. The decision period may be extended to 45 days when further consideration is needed.

## Download Form
Click for English version of Application form. 
Click for Czech version of Application form. 
Note: Application should fill in English language with capital letter.

visa_types.name: Work
visa_types.documents_required:
Application form
- Must be filled with capital letters  only in English, in latin  alphabet
- Must be signed by parents/ legal guardian (if applicants under age18)
Photo
- Biometric photo
- Colored, 3,5 x 4,5 (approximately 1,2 x 1,6 inch)
- Light and monophonic background (white)
Passport
- Passport must be issued not late within 10 years
- At least 3 months till intended visit from schengen area
- Minimum two free pages
- Passport copy: identificatin page and all previous schengen visas (with stamps)
Identification  card
- Original and copy of two pages
 Confirmation goal of trip 
- Authorization of  offıce Czech Republic –  is accepted originally by faks or e-mail
- Invitation letter from company
- Attorney documents must be confirmed at notarial
- Must not be late 6 months
Confirmation of accomodation
Confirmation of living where will be shown:
name, surname, date of birth,number of passport,  reservation date , signiture and stamp of  hotel 
- During stay at Czech Republic  having  cash
- All notarial confirmation documents must not be late 6 months.
 Flight Reservation 
- Ticket reservation in two ways
- Ticket reservation for double visa in two ways for both trips
Medical Insurance 
- Medical insurance to Schengen area, covering the entire period of intended  stay, the minimum coverage must be 30.000 EUR/ 50 000 US
- For registration double visa, must be submitted insurance for both trips
- For multi visa you should sign 4th   pages of applicatin form , where customer states to cover insurance the entire period of trip
Proof of applicants regular income
- Reference from work
- For business visa:  The company registration in the chamber of  commerce and a copy of the bulletin of the trade register (VOEN)
- Reference from Pension fund proof of getting pension
- All references from regular income
Proof of applicant’s pay slip
- Refence from bank ( at least 60 EURO for one day for one person, it’s possible  with EURO or different currency )
- Copy of international credit card (credit card) from the same bank which you  get reference
Attention: All documents and copies (except passport copy) in Azerbaijan language must be translated to Russian or English language with notarial confirmation.

Attention: Dear customers! All checklist documents suggested to Azerbaijan citizens. Citizens from different countries can submit all noticed documents only if he/she has registration card to Azerbaijan Republic, after his/her return from schengen area must be minimum 3 months

Attention: The consulate at Czech embassy may need extra documents. All documents must be submitted not earlier 6 months (180 days) applying to schengen area.

The list of supporting documents can be found below. 
Supporting Documents List (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6YwwmBQAJ3uWsTXxbzf0SK/488c18e88343c3c552aa8daff904c380/Supporting_Document_List.pdf)
